headline_seed: Colorado governor faces backlash over clemency for 2020 election denier Tina Peters - BBC
draft_text:
Colorado Gov. Polis commuted Tina Peters' nearly nine-year sentence; she walks June 1, 2026. NPR and NBC News both confirm Polis called it disproportionate for a first-time, nonviolent offender — not a pardon. She remains a convicted felon.

And that's the mews.
